findings.message:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract Exchange (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#240-331) has payable functions:
	 - Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#278-307)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
findings.name: locked-ether

findings.message:
Wallet.changeMinimumQuorum(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#588-591) contains a tautology or contradiction:
	- require(bool,string)(newQuorum >= 0 && newQuorum <= 100,Invalid quorum) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#589)
findings.name: tautology

findings.message:
Wallet.updateExchangeFee(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#619-622) contains a tautology or contradiction:
	- require(bool,string)(newExchangeFee >= 0 && newExchangeFee <= 100,Invalid fee) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#620)
findings.name: tautology

findings.message: Wallet.getExchangeRate(string) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#568-570) ignores return value by IOracle(oracleContract).readRate(symbol) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#569)
findings.name: unused-return

findings.message: Wallet.requestExchangeRate(string) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#574-576) ignores return value by IOracle(oracleContract).requestRate(symbol) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#575)
findings.name: unused-return

findings.message:
Wallet.changeOwnership(address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#624-627) should emit an event for: 
	- owner = newOwner (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#626)
findings.name: events-access

findings.message:
Wallet.updateMaximumRateDelay(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#615-617) should emit an event for: 
	- maximumRateDelay = newMaximumRateDelay (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#616)
findings.name: events-maths

findings.message:
Wallet.updateExchangeFee(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#619-622) should emit an event for: 
	- exchangeFee = newExchangeFee (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#621)
findings.name: events-maths

findings.message:
Oracle.constructor(address)._authorizedWallet (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#88) lacks a zero-check on :
		- authorizedWallet = _authorizedWallet (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#89)
findings.name: missing-zero-check

findings.message:
Exchange.constructor(address,address)._authorizedWallet (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#268) lacks a zero-check on :
		- authorizedWallet = _authorizedWallet (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#269)
findings.name: missing-zero-check

findings.message:
Exchange.constructor(address,address)._oracleContract (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#268) lacks a zero-check on :
		- oracleContract = _oracleContract (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#270)
findings.name: missing-zero-check

findings.message:
Oracle.answerRequest(uint256,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#127-167) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(req.active,Request not active) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#131)
	- require(bool,string)(! req.answers[msg.sender],Oracle already answered) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#132)
	- req.requestTime < exchangeRateTime[req.currency] (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#146)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#278-307) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- (block.timestamp - rateTime) > maximumRateDelay (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#292)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#8)
findings.name: solc-version

findings.message:
Low level call in Wallet.externalTransfer(uint256,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#414-422):
	- (success,None) = to.call{value: amount}() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#420)
findings.name: low-level-calls

	- (success,None) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#455)
findings.name: low-level-calls
